differential_diagnoses: Metastatic carcinoma (e.g., from lung or unknown primary)
Right atrial thrombus (associated with pacemaker lead)
next_steps: Perform image-guided tissue biopsy (via endomyocardial approach or CT-guided transthoracic/transesophageal needle biopsy)
Perform PET/CT imaging to evaluate for primary malignancy and systemic involvement
Perform cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement for tissue characterization
Maintain anticoagulation and optimize heart failure management
Obtain oncology and cardiothoracic surgery consultations for multidisciplinary management planning
Perform cardiac MRI with gadolinium enhancement for tissue characterization
Perform PET/CT imaging to evaluate for systemic metastatic burden and occult primary malignancy
Perform thoracentesis for cytologic analysis of pleural fluid
Obtain cardiology, cardiothoracic surgery, and oncology consultations for multidisciplinary management
Maintain anticoagulation and manage heart failure and SVC syndrome symptoms
Plan for biopsy (surgical or guided needle) only after comprehensive non-invasive assessment
